name: SEIREI HENKOU: TENRAPPA BAKUHA (SOUL MODIFICATION: HEAVEN ' S TRUMPET BLAST )

description.value:
Type: Chakra Control (Spirit)

Rank: 8

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 25

Components: C, F, E

As shinobi develop through their careers, most accumulate a large store of chakra within their bodies. The Soul Edges of old were unable to tap into these reserves to empower the weapons that reflected their ever-changing chakra. Now a technique has been created which allows a user to pack their chakra into a Soul Edge and release a devastating swing of raw chakra that injures anyone in its arc. Anyone caught within the area of the Tenrappa Bakuha receives 10d6 Force damage; a successful reflex save reduces the damage by half. Unattended objects also receive damage from this technique. Once the technique is performed, the Soul Edge used for the attack dissipates.

Requires: Seireiha (3); any 1 other Seirei Henkou Technique

Material Focus: 1 Soul Edge.

Empower: The range of this technique is increased by 5 feet for every 2 chakra points added to a maximum of 60 feet.

Mastery: At the third step of mastery in this technique, the user may perform this technique once and affect a second Soul Edge with the same Elemental Affinity.

At the fifth step of mastery in this technique, the user may use a different Elemental Affinity on separate Soul Edges.

SEIREI HENKOU: TORA NO KOUGAKE (SOUL MODIFICATION: GAUNTLETS OF THE TIGER)

Chakra Control (Spirit) (Requires Seireiha (3); any 1 other Seirei Henkou Technique)

Rank: 8 (A); Learn DC: 26, 3 successes; Perform: 10 (DC 25); Time: 1 move action; Components: C, E; Range: Personal; Duration: 1 round/level or 1 full-round; Save: None; Cost: 8.

Once this technique is performed the designated Soul Edge changes shape and wraps around the user's forearm. The chakra also extends past the user's finger tips creating menacing claws that are double in length of his fingers. The user automatically gains proficiency with claw attacks and can apply his dexterity modifier to Attack Rolls. Because the claws are held together by intense chakra control, damage dealt by Tora no Kougake are 2d6 + Wisdom modifier and is considered chakra-enhanced. The Soul Edge in this state can also be used defensively granting the user a +2 Deflection bonus to his AC.

system.area: Semi-circle, center where user is located

actions.name: Use
actions.area: Semi-circle, center where user is located
